title: What Whitney Issik left out about women workers
author: Kim Siever
notes: Tier 4 advocacy analysis by Kim Siever (independent journalist, Lethbridge). Corroboration/context only, not load-bearing for contested facts; StatsCan (R-041) carries the figures (Bell rule). Key points: contextualizes Issik's same-day statement, presents the year-over-year change in women's Alberta employment (Dec 2020 to Dec 2021), and notes that neither the LFS data nor Issik's statement accounts for non-binary workers. Reclassified from finding_tool to url_article per this pass; confirm if you prefer it stay a finding tool.
